name: Abu Dhabi (United Arab Emirates)

colors.symbolism: the traditional Trucial States red, common to the smaller emirate flags
the canton at the upper hoist, distinguishing Abu Dhabi from neighbouring emirates

description: A red field with a small white rectangle in the upper hoist canton.
history: Abu Dhabi is the largest of the seven emirates of the United Arab Emirates and the seat of the federal capital. The emirate flag — a red field with a white canton — has been used since before the federation of 1971 and continues to be flown alongside the federal UAE flag.
